summary: FAIL across all five dimensions. The most load-bearing defects: (1) FIND-001 — the InitialUIState carries `initialNoteId` instead of the spec-mandated `editingSessionState` aggregate, so REQ-010 / REQ-014 are silently bypassed and the affected tests assert the wrong post-condition; (2) FIND-002 — Step 4 never invokes Note.create with an empty Body, so REQ-010 is structurally absent from production code and tests; (3) FIND-003 — pipeline.ts:86 calls Clock.now between Step 2 and Step 3 to populate VaultScanned.occurredOn, contradicting REQ-015's I/O confinement clause. Additional defects (FIND-004, FIND-005, FIND-006) show that NoteId VO validation, Tag VO validation, and the 'invalid-value' edge case are bypassed by `unknown[]` casts and stub-only tests. Verification-readiness defects (FIND-007, FIND-008) show PROP-021's PublicDomainEvent membership claim is enforced via a hand-maintained string list rather than a TypeScript type assertion, and the Rust PROP-003/PROP-022 proptests are not demonstrably executed in this sprint.
